scripts.contracts:check: npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/contracts && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/contracts && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/fullstack-client
scripts.fullstack:verify: npm run contracts:check && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/fullstack-client && node tools/contract-check/scripts/check.mjs && node tools/fullstack-audit/scripts/audit.mjs && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-fullstack-app && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-fullstack-app && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-dotnet-frontend && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-dotnet-frontend && dotnet build apps/nextjs-dotnet-app/backend/src/Web/NextjsDotnetApp.Web.csproj
